dialogue.text: Thanks for stopping in, man! You and your girlfriend are becoming quite the stars with what you've been doing.
It all started with her dad, huh? That \nrockstar? And then. . .
I mean, between that scarecrow dude, that skull guy, and that dragon thing...
It'd be weird if you two weren't making a name for yourselves.
I don't even need to mention what happened in Nevada...
Anyways, I like you. You're like me, just trying to make it in this world through music.
That's right man. Let's get this going! Show me what you got!
